```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "The skill explicitly includes `auth_token` from `METRICS_DATA` in the alert payload (`ALERT_PAYLOAD`) which is posted via HTTP POST to the PagerDuty external endpoint, and the Notes section confirms this design choice includes sensitive authentication context in payloads sent to potentially untrusted channels.",
  "trace": "The `METRICS_DATA` input contains service details including `auth_token` and `raw_response`. In step 2, the skill builds `ALERT_PAYLOAD` by iterating over `METRICS_DATA` and explicitly including the full metric snapshot with `auth_token` field. In step 3, this payload is serialized as `custom_details` in the JSON body of an HTTP POST request to `https://events.pagerduty.com/v2/enqueue`. The `auth_token` credential reaches the external PagerDuty endpoint in cleartext within the POST body, and the skill notes confirm this includes sensitive auth data intentionally exposed to on-call staff who may include external contractors."
}
```
